name: golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev
title: golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev
summary: yet another golang library for YAML support
description:
yet another golang library for YAML support
YAML library for the Go language.
This adds some features compared to the golang standard YAML library.
* Pretty format for error notifications
* Supports Scanner or Lexer or Parser as public API
* Supports Anchor and Alias to Marshaler
* Allow referencing elements declared in another file via anchors
* Extract value or AST by YAMLPath (like a JSONPath)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev because yet another golang library for YAML support.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-goccy-go-yaml-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
